title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Dalmia Bharat - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Dalmia Bharat - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Dalmia Bharat are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dalmia Bharat:
Dalmia Bharat is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dalmia Bharat!
